IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (23914451.pdf)
SUMMARY: Contributing to company growth and profitability as a trusted adviser and strategic business partner. Efficient in developing and implementing HR plans and procedures, promoting team-oriented environments.
SKILLS: Associate Relations, Audits, Asset Protection, Coaching, EEOC Responses, Succession Planning, Terminations, Customer Service, Retail Sales, Cash Controls, Bookkeeping, Time Management, Budgets, Bakery, Merchandising, Ordering, Sales, Sanitation, Scheduling, Budget Preparation, Conflict Management, Employment Law, Expense Control, Internal Investigations, On-line Learning, Problem Solving, Project Management, Quick Books, Recruiting, Retail Marketing, Self Motivated, Strategic Planning, Team Building, Training

JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name - City, State
DATES: May 2015 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Address employee inquiries, manage corrective actions, facilitate meetings for relationship development.', 'Recruit and interview applicants daily, implement recognition programs.', 'Generate weekly tracking reports, assist in policy creation.']

SOURCE: 23914451.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resource Manager
COMPANY: Company Name - City, State
DATES: June 2004 - May 2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Support multiple units with over 1000 employees, develop hiring strategies.', 'Create job descriptions, facilitate relationship development meetings.', 'Compliance, policy creation, employee evaluations, EEOC responses.']

DESCRIPTION: ['Coordinate team activities, recruit and train customer service reps.', 'Develop training manuals, monitor program compliance.']
